description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean lines and a flat roof. The exterior is finished in a combination of white and blue-gray tones, with large rectangular windows providing ample natural light. The structure includes multiple levels and terraces, with a prominent balcony and a partially enclosed outdoor area at the front. The main entryway is recessed and sheltered, with a small set of steps leading up to the door. The house is surrounded by a low perimeter wall and paved walkways, suggesting an urban or suburban setting. The overall appearance is minimalist, with an emphasis on geometric forms and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, multi-level house with a flat roof, large windows, and a minimalist white and blue-gray exterior. Features include a balcony, recessed entryway, and a surrounding low wall.
description_view_0: This view highlights the front facade with a balcony, large windows, and the main entryway, as well as the low perimeter wall and outdoor seating area.
description_view_1: This angle shows the side of the house with garage doors, additional windows, and the continuation of the perimeter wall along the street.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals a simpler, more solid wall with fewer windows and a long, continuous blue-gray facade.
description_view_3: This view displays the back and side of the house, emphasizing the flat roof sections and the solid, windowless portions of the exterior.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with steps, sheltered by an overhang, and minimal decorative elements
